subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and hast rejoiced in the light of the dawning morn! The edifice of contingent being hath been nourished through His might [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی المیثاق و استبشر من نور الاشراق قد ترعرع بنیان الامکان من سطوه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant
